top_signals.title: Fed’s Logan Favors Modestly Higher Rates to Lower Inflation
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas President Lorie Logan called for higher interest rates, saying inflation does not appear to be heading sustainably back to the central bank’s 2% target.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Prologis seeing demand bump for logistics warehouses
top_signals.summary:
Logistics warehouse operator Prologis said leasing activity was at an all-time high during the second quarter.

The post Prologis seeing demand bump for logistics warehouses appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Blanche’s confirmation as US attorney-general could hinge on meeting Epstein’s victims
top_signals.summary: Thom Tillis threatens to block acting AG’s appointment as scandal over sex offender overshadows nomination

top_signals.title: Frasers slams ‘nonsense rumours’ over Harvey Nichols bid
top_signals.summary: The boss of Frasers has hit back at “nonsense rumours” that retail brands are reluctant to work with the group, which is known for making aggressive plays to take control of rival companies. The group, which owns Sports Direct and Flannels, gatecrashed the auction to buy luxury department store Harvey Nichols last week, despite some [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
